landing.title: Prüffuchs – Micro-Influencer Marketing for Amazon Sellers
landing.description: Prüffuchs connects Amazon brands with micro-influencers. Real purchases, authentic UGC content, better rankings. Pay per result — only for verified posts.
landing.ogTitle: Prüffuchs – Micro-Influencer Marketing for Amazon Sellers
landing.ogDescription: Real purchases. Real UGC content. Better rankings. Start for free today.

hero.subline: Micro-influencers buy your product, test it honestly and post authentic content. You benefit from real sales, better ranking and more visibility.

howItWorks.title: How Prüffuchs works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to authentic influencer marketing
howItWorks.step1Desc: Define your product, budget and target audience. We create the campaign and find matching micro-influencers.
howItWorks.step2Desc: The influencer buys your product as a real customer, creates authentic content, and publishes it on their channels.
howItWorks.step3Desc: After the post is approved, the influencer receives the purchase price back. You only pay for verified results.

brands.title: Marketing that actually works
brands.subtitle: Scale your marketing with genuine product purchases and authentic user generated content.
brands.benefit1Desc: Influencers buy your product as real customers — for maximum authenticity and honest reviews.
brands.benefit2Desc: Receive high-quality user generated content for your own channels and advertisements.
brands.benefit3Desc: More real purchases improve your Amazon ranking and visibility in search engines.
brands.benefit4Desc: You only pay for verified, published posts — no risk, no hidden costs.

influencers.title: Test products, get your money back
influencers.subtitle: Apply to campaigns, buy products and receive the full purchase price back after your post.
influencers.benefit1Desc: Buy products and receive the full purchase price back after publishing your post.
influencers.benefit2Desc: Register, browse active campaigns and apply with just a few clicks.
influencers.benefit3Desc: After your post is approved, the refund is transferred directly to your account.
influencers.req1: At least 200 followers on a social media channel

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: All answers to your most important questions
faq.a1: Prüffuchs connects brands with micro-influencers. Influencers buy products as real customers, create honest content and receive the purchase price back. Brands only pay for verified, published posts.
faq.q2: Who can apply as an influencer?
faq.a2: Anyone with at least 200 followers on Instagram, TikTok, YouTube or any other public channel and residence in Germany or Austria can register.
faq.q3: How and when do I get refunded as an influencer?
faq.a3: After your post is approved by the brand, the full purchase price will be transferred to your registered account within 7 business days.
faq.q4: What happens if my post is not approved?
faq.a4: You first get the opportunity to revise your post. If no agreement is reached, our support team will decide fairly and transparently.
faq.a5: Yes, registration and applying to campaigns is completely free for influencers. You only advance the purchase price, which is fully refunded after approval.
faq.q6: How can brands get started with Prüffuchs?
faq.a6: Book a free consultation with our team. We set up your account, discuss your goals and budgets, and launch your first campaign together.

footer.tagline: Authentic influencer marketing for the next generation.
